admissions.gpa_policy: No explicit minimum GPA was found on the cited official pages used in this auto-enrichment pass.
admissions.course_rigor: Lehigh boasts a vibrant and genuine campus community, rigorous academics, a commitment to student belonging and a track record of strong graduate outcomes. This is Lehigh.
admissions.recommendations: Comments and recommendations from the principal, headmaster, guidance counselor, teachers, or other professional educators within the school system
admissions.essays: Our holistic review recognizes the individual’s characteristics and achievements—which can be found in the school transcript, recommendations, essays, extracurricular accomplishments, leadership experiences, and other factors which might be unique to the applicant. We also take into consideration the influence of the environments in which a student lives and learns has on the individual—noted in the school profile, student’s personal background and more.

evidence.source_excerpt: With more than 100 majors, minors and programs across four colleges, Lehigh offers students a broad selection of academic options. Take the time to explore what might be right for you.
